sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 65:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 65:1
items.html: Since the ascent of the bottom Hey to the Nikvey Einayim onward, when Bina departed from the degree, Bina acquired the name Beria, from the word Batei Barai [outskirts]. (Inner Observation, Item 26)
